response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video to identify segments. Identified an intro/outro section and a vocal song performance. 2. Identified the song 'Hyper Jumpin'' from on-screen text. 3. Identified the composer as PandaBoY. 4. Searched for the lyrics of 'Hyper Jumpin'' using 'Hyper Jumpin PandaBOY lyrics'. 5. Verified lyrics were correct and complete. 6. Translated the lyrics into English. 7. Mapped the scenes to the final JSON structure, including timestamps. 8. Corrected the final scene's end timestamp to match the actual video duration.
response.global_summary: The video features an introductory greeting from the Hololive 5th Generation VTubers, followed by a countdown and a full vocal performance of their song "Hyper Jumpin'", followed by a brief concluding interaction.

scenes.description: The Hololive 5th Generation VTubers greet the audience and introduce the performance. No vocal music is present.
The VTubers perform the song 'Hyper Jumpin''. The performance features singing and dancing on a stage. Text overlays credit the song to PandaBoY.
